description: Utility methods to verify object and primitive types. These methods are also available on the global util object.

methods.name: each
methods.description: Iterates over each member in an Object or Array, invoking the callback for each.

params.name: iterable
params.description: The Object or Array to iterate over

params.name: callback
params.description: Callback invoked for each member. Return false to break.

methods.name: extend
methods.description: Copies all properties from the contributor object to the receiver object.

params.name: receiver
params.description: The destination object to copy properties into

params.name: contributor
params.description: The source object to copy properties from

methods.name: isArray
methods.description: Returns true if the obj parameter is a JavaScript Array object.

methods.name: isAsyncFunction
methods.description: Returns true if the obj parameter is a JavaScript Async Function.

methods.name: isBoolean
methods.description: Returns true if the obj parameter is a JavaScript Boolean.

methods.name: isDate
methods.description: Returns true if the obj parameter is a JavaScript Date object.

methods.name: isFunction
methods.description: Returns true if the obj parameter is a JavaScript Function or Async Function.

methods.name: isNumber
methods.description: Returns true if the obj parameter is a JavaScript Number or evaluates to one.

methods.name: isObject
methods.description: Returns true if the obj parameter is a plain JavaScript object (new Object() or {}).

methods.name: isRegExp
methods.description: Returns true if the obj parameter is a JavaScript RegExp object.

methods.name: isString
methods.description: Returns true if the obj parameter is a JavaScript String or evaluates to one.
